title: Speculative Sampling For Faster Molecular Dynamics
summary: Molecular dynamics (MD) is a key tool for simulating the dynamical behavior of atomic systems. However, MD is inherently serial, which makes it difficult to increase single-system throughput with concurrent compute. To address this, we introduce Langevin Speculative Dynamics (LSD), a distributed and model-agnostic speculative sampler for accelerating MD without adding relative error. Inspired by speculative methods in language and diffusion modeling, LSD uses a draft model to propose fast simulation steps and verifies them in parallel with a slower target model, applying a transport map from the draft to the target distribution. We extend speculative sampling to second-order Langevin dynamics, derive the achievable speedup as a function of physical parameters, show that LSD generalizes across different systems and draft-target combinations with a 3-9x speedup, and confirm theoretically and empirically that LSD samples trajectories from its target model distribution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Langevin Speculative Dynamics (LSD) 的分布式和模型无关的推测采样方法，用于加速分子动力学模拟，无需增加相对误差。
AI.motivation: 传统的分子动力学模拟是串行的，难以通过并发计算提高单系统吞吐量。机器学习原子势 (MLIP) 虽然能提供高精度，但计算速度慢，限制了其应用。
AI.method: LSD 借鉴了语言和扩散模型中的推测方法，使用一个快速的草稿模型提出模拟步骤，并与较慢的目标模型并行验证这些步骤，通过一个从草稿到目标的传输映射来保证采样正确性。该方法推广到二阶 Langevin 方程。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，LSD 在不同系统和草稿-目标模型组合中实现了 3-9 倍的加速，并且理论和经验上都证实 LSD 采样轨迹来自目标模型分布。
AI.conclusion: LSD 提供了一种加速分子动力学模拟的有效方法，同时保证了采样轨迹的准确性，为研究原子系统的动态行为提供了新的途径。

title: Towards Automated Discovery: A Review of Generative Models, Multimodal Learning and Closed-Loop Workflows in Inverse Materials Design
summary: Inverse materials design is shifting materials discovery from forward prediction to targeted proposal of candidates that satisfy objectives under physical constraints. Here, we review recent advances in generative crystal structure modeling, multimodal learning, and closed-loop design pipelines for crystalline solids. We survey how modern generators learn chemical-structural priors from large databases to enable controllable sampling of periodic structures, and compare leading model classes including variational autoencoders, normalizing flows, autoregressive formulations, and diffusion models. Particular attention is given to how feasibility constraints and physical priors are enforced across the workflow, through representation choices, training objectives, sampling-time guidance, and post-generation screening and relaxation. We also discuss how multimodal learning fuses diverse materials modalities, including crystal structures, thermodynamic, electronic information, microscopy, spectroscopy, processing context, and scientific text, to construct a more universal, transferable representation of chemical space. In addition, diverse inverse-design strategies are examined, particularly those that integrate conditional generation with latent optimization, Bayesian optimization, reinforcement learning, and active learning. Finally, we highlight recurring failure modes, such as surrogate exploitation, diversity collapse, distribution shift, and the stability-synthesizability gap, and outline discovery-grade evaluation practices based on staged reporting of validity, novelty, uniqueness, stability, and cost.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了逆材料设计领域中生成模型、多模态学习和闭环工作流程的最新进展，旨在实现自动化材料发现，从传统的预测工作流程转向有针对性的候选材料提案。
AI.motivation: 传统的材料发现方法依赖于试错法，效率低下。逆材料设计通过机器学习和深度学习，将材料发现重新定义为一种有方向性的搜索问题，旨在寻找满足特定目标和物理约束的材料。
AI.method: 本文综述了生成晶体结构模型（如变分自编码器、归一化流、自回归公式和扩散模型）、多模态学习（融合晶体结构、热力学、电子信息等多种材料模态）以及各种逆设计策略（如条件生成与潜优化、贝叶斯优化、强化学习和主动学习）。同时，分析了自动化发现流程中的常见失败模式，并提出了基于分阶段评估的实践。
AI.result: 研究表明，生成模型、多模态学习、主动学习和逆材料设计共同推动了材料发现的自动化，但其潜力取决于这些组件在验证感知的发现工作流程中的整合。 识别并讨论了诸如代理利用、多样性崩溃、分布偏移和稳定-可合成性差距等常见失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个构建更可靠的自动化发现工作流程的实用框架，并概述了迈向自驱动实验室的集成路径，强调了快速筛选的重要性不足，需要关注材料的稳定性、可合成性和物理约束。

title: Cellular Sheaf Neural Operators for Structure-Preserving Surrogate Modeling of Constrained PDEs
summary: Neural operators provide fast surrogate models for PDE simulations, but standard architectures often treat geometry and discretization as secondary to field data. Physical states are usually represented as grid-channel stacks, even when different quantities naturally belong on vertices, edges, faces, cells, boundaries, or interfaces and must satisfy compatibility constraints. We propose Cellular Sheaf Neural Operators, a discretization-aware framework for structure-preserving neural PDE surrogates. The method represents PDE states on oriented cell complexes, couples local feature spaces through learned restriction maps, and uses incidence/Hodge-informed message passing to follow computational geometry. Learned update heads pass through coboundary or flux maps, allowing selected constraints to arise from cell-complex structure rather than only from loss penalties. For magnetohydrodynamics, this yields face-based magnetic-flux updates driven by edge electromotive fields and finite-volume-style fluid updates driven by learned face fluxes and cell sources. On turbulent MHD and fusion-equilibrium surrogate tasks, the method improves structure-sensitive diagnostics, including rollout behavior, divergence control, spectral error, and equilibrium-regression accuracy. These results indicate that cellular-sheaf structure is a useful inductive bias for neural PDE surrogates in constrained multiphysics systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cellular Sheaf Neural Operators (CSNO) 的新框架，用于构建结构化的神经网络 PDE 替代模型，该模型能够更好地处理约束条件并提高物理一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统的神经网络 PDE 替代模型通常将模拟状态表示为均匀的网格通道，忽略了物理量在不同几何结构（顶点、边、面、单元）上的自然分布和兼容性约束，导致模型精度和物理一致性下降。
AI.method: CSNO 使用定向胞状复形表示 PDE 状态，通过学习的限制映射耦合局部特征空间，并利用基于incidence/Hodge的传递机制来遵循计算几何结构。更新头通过 coboundary 或 flux 映射传递，从而将约束条件嵌入到模型结构中，而不是仅仅依赖于损失惩罚。
AI.result: 在湍流 MHD 和聚变平衡替代任务中，CSNO 提高了对结构敏感的诊断指标，包括 rollout 行为、散度控制、谱误差和平衡回归精度。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，胞状结构是一种有用的归纳偏差，可用于受约束的多物理系统中的神经网络 PDE 替代模型，能够提高模型在物理一致性方面的性能。

title: An Exploratory Study into using Machine-Learning for Fast Step-by-step Emulation of Numerical Mechanical Thrombectomy Simulations for Ischemic Stroke
summary: The treatment of ischemic stroke using mechanical thrombectomy involves difficult decisions under intense time constraints. Numerical physics simulations can in theory inform operators to make better decisions regarding treatment approaches and device selection, but are too slow to do so in practice. In this thesis, we investigate if current machine learning based surrogates can accurately emulate these simulations in a step-by-step manner while making them significantly faster. To do this we train three surrogate models on two simulations that involve a simplified aspiration procedure, with varying levels of geometric complexity. Our results show that two of our models accurately predict singular simulation steps and provide substantial speedups, especially when combined with specific data augmentations. However, the models showed a lack of stability when emulating simulations with complex geometries over longer time periods. Overall, this work provides a foundation for future studies to develop stable methods that scale to realistic numerical physics simulations of mechanical thrombectomy.

AI.tldr: 本研究探索了利用机器学习加速数值机械血栓切除术模拟的步骤，旨在为临床决策提供更快速的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 传统的数值模拟计算量大，难以实时应用。本研究旨在开发机器学习模型作为替代方案（代理模型），以加速模拟过程，并为中风治疗提供更快的支持。
AI.method: 研究使用了BendVessel和ClotEntry数据集，并基于Erwin、Transolver和MeshGraphNet等机器学习模型进行训练，采用数据增强技术，评估模型在测试集和未见几何结构上的性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，机器学习模型能够有效地模拟血栓切除术过程，数据增强技术可以提升模型性能，并且模型在一定程度上能够泛化到未见几何结构。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习模型具有作为数值机械血栓切除术模拟的步骤代理模型的潜力，可以显著加速模拟过程，为临床应用提供支持。未来的研究可以进一步提升模型的泛化能力和精度。

title: Spectral Reach: Understanding Neural Scaling as Progress into the Spectral Tail
summary: Neural scaling laws describe predictable power-law relationships between model size, dataset size, compute, and performance. While these laws guide the development of modern foundation models, the mechanisms underpinning them remain poorly understood, in part due to the absence of scalable analysis tools. To close this gap, we introduce "spectral position": a scalable measure of which eigenvalues of the empirical neural tangent kernel (eNTK) currently drive loss reduction. Applying this measure to scaling experiments, we find that spectral position decreases throughout training: learning shifts from dominant eigenmodes into the spectral tail. Larger models reach further into the tail than smaller models, revealing a size-dependent capacity we call "spectral reach". This suggests why larger models achieve lower losses: they sustain learning on weak spectral signals inaccessible to smaller models. We further identify feature learning as a key enabler of spectral reach. It adaptively amplifies gradient magnitudes as learning advances, sustaining progress where frozen representations stall. This points to concrete interventions through architecture and optimizer design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“谱域覆盖率”（Spectral Reach）的可扩展指标，用于理解神经网络扩展规律。研究发现，更大的模型在训练过程中能够深入到经验神经切线核（eNTK）的谱域尾部，从而实现更低的损失。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络扩展规律虽然能指导模型开发，但其底层机制尚不明确。本文旨在通过可扩展的分析工具，揭示扩展规律背后的机制。
AI.method: 本文引入了“谱域位置”（Spectral Position）指标，用于衡量当前损失降低由eNTK的哪些特征值驱动。通过损失-网络-位置（LNP）分解，该指标可以从样本梯度中评估，无需显式构建核函数。并将其应用于现代视觉和语言模型的扩展实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，随着训练进行，谱域位置降低，更大的模型能够达到更低的谱域位置，即具有更大的谱域覆盖率。特征学习被发现是实现谱域覆盖率的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 本文的研究表明，更大的模型能够利用更弱的谱信号进行学习，这解释了它们能够实现更低损失的原因。研究结果为架构和优化器设计提供了具体的指导方向。

title: Data-Driven Spectral Prediction for Accelerating Large-Scale Electronic Structure Calculations
summary: Simulating large molecular systems comprising thousands of atoms requires highly scalable methodologies. While modern Density Functional Theory (DFT) codes exhibit linear scaling, solving the associated large, sparse generalized eigenproblems remains a critical computational bottleneck on exascale architectures. In the context of the LimitX project, we propose a data-driven framework to accelerate these calculations. By shifting the machine learning target from discrete eigenvalues to the coefficients of an interpolating Chebyshev polynomial, and by comparing both all-atom and fragment-based structural representations, we successfully overcome the dimensionality constraints of large-scale spectral prediction. We investigate three machine learning models (Kernel Ridge Regression, Graph Neural Networks, and Random Forests) trained on a novel 2 TB dataset of protein dimers. The predicted spectra provide initial guesses that effectively bypass early Self-Consistent Field (SCF) iterations in BigDFT. Ultimately, these spectral predictors will be deployed to dynamically optimize upcoming rational filter-based eigensolvers, such as FrASE, which is currently in initial development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的框架，通过机器学习预测电子结构计算中的谱信息，以加速大规模电子结构计算，并有效绕过自洽场(SCF)迭代。
AI.motivation: 现代密度泛函理论(DFT)计算虽然具有线性扩展性，但求解相关的巨大稀疏广义特征问题仍然是超大规模架构中的关键计算瓶颈。研究旨在解决这一瓶颈，并为未来的exascale计算提供更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 研究人员将机器学习目标从离散特征值转移到插值切比雪夫多项式的系数，并比较了全原子和基于片段的结构表示。他们使用了核岭回归、图神经网络和随机森林三种机器学习模型，在一个2TB的蛋白质二聚体数据集上进行训练，预测谱信息作为BigDFT的初始猜测。
AI.result: 预测的谱信息能够有效地绕过BigDFT中的早期自洽场(SCF)迭代，表明了数据驱动的谱预测在加速电子结构计算方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为动态优化未来的基于合理滤波器的特征求解器（如FrASE）提供了基础，有望进一步提升大规模电子结构计算的效率和可扩展性。

title: Free energy Estimation on Any State Space
summary: Free energy estimation is a fundamental yet challenging problem, from physics to statistics. Classical approaches rely on thermodynamic transformations, ranging from direct estimation, quasistatic integration, to finite-time averaging. Recent work [He and Du et al., 2025] learns neural transports to significantly accelerate the efficiency in the finite-time regime. In this paper, we generalize this framework to arbitrary state spaces. Building on this view, we develop a generalized neural transport learning approach for efficient estimation. Experiments validate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed method beyond continuous settings, extending to discrete and multimodal spaces as well as autoregressive settings. Beyond free energy estimation, we establish algebraic identities and reveal a group-theoretic structure linking infinitesimal time reversal and generalized Doob's $h$-transforms, showing that their compositions form a generalized dihedral group.

AI.tldr: 本文将基于神经网络的自由能估计框架推广到任意状态空间，并揭示了时间反演和Doob h变换之间的代数关系，构建了广义二面体群。
AI.motivation: 现有自由能估计方法在处理高维、离散或多模态状态空间时存在局限性，且通常依赖于特定的时间可逆结构。为了解决这些问题，需要一种适用于任意状态空间的通用且高效的自由能估计方法。
AI.method: 本文基于先前工作的神经网络传输学习方法，将其推广到任意状态空间。具体地，开发了一种用于高效估计的广义神经网络传输学习方法，并通过实验验证了其有效性和效率，并建立了时间反演和Doob h变换之间的代数关系。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，提出的方法在连续、离散和多模态空间以及自回归设置中都有效。此外，还发现了时间反演和Doob h变换之间的代数关系，并揭示了它们组成的广义二面体群。
AI.conclusion: 本文的贡献在于将自由能估计方法推广到更广泛的状态空间，并揭示了其潜在的数学结构，为自由能估计和相关领域的研究提供了新的视角和工具。

title: Manifold Diffusion for Structure Generation of Transition Metal Complexes
summary: Transition metal complexes are central to catalysis, drug design, and materials science, with relevant properties strongly sensitive to their three-dimensional geometry. However, the electronic diversity and unconventional bonding environments of transition metal complexes pose a major challenge for accurate structure generation. In this work, we introduce TMCgen, a manifold diffusion machine learning model that efficiently and accurately generates geometries of transition metal complexes. By formulating the diffusion process over the metal-ligand coordination angles, combined with torsional and rotational diffusion of the ligands, TMCgen focuses on the key geometric degrees of freedom of transition metal complexes. TMCgen shows strong performance in generating accurate coordination environments on a diverse set of experimentally derived bioinorganic and organometallic complexes while requiring only few inference steps, enabling efficient generation. Our results demonstrate the potential of manifold-based generative modeling for data-efficient geometry generation, paving the way for property-conditioned design of transition metal complexes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TMCgen的扩散模型，用于高效准确地生成过渡金属配合物的几何结构，解决了传统方法在处理过渡金属配合物复杂几何结构时的挑战。
AI.motivation: 过渡金属配合物在催化、药物设计和材料科学中至关重要，其性能高度依赖于三维几何结构。然而，过渡金属配合物的电子多样性和非传统键合环境使得准确生成其结构具有挑战性。
AI.method: TMCgen通过在金属-配体配位角上构建扩散过程，并结合配体的扭转和旋转扩散，专注于过渡金属配合物的主要几何自由度。该模型仅需少量推断步骤即可生成准确的配位环境。
AI.result: TMCgen在生成实验衍生的生物无机和有机金属配合物的配位环境方面表现出强大的性能，并且只需要少量的推断步骤。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明基于流形生成建模在数据高效的几何生成方面的潜力，为过渡金属配合物的性质条件设计铺平了道路。

title: Site4Drug: Predicting Drug-Binding Target Sites with an AI Agent
summary: Selecting where to intervene on a protein (i.e., choosing a targetable site) is often a more ambiguous and failure-prone bottleneck than selecting what binds, especially for membrane proteins where accessibility, topology, and post-translational modifications (PTMs) constrain actionable regions. We present Site4Drug, a modality-aware site-finding agent that outputs a ranked list of targetable regions with explicit constraints, evidence summaries, risk flags, and a traceable decision log.   Rather than requiring users to specify the drug modality upfront, Site4Drug can recommend a binding modality (e.g., antibody/peptide-like vs small-molecule) from the same evidence used for site discovery, including topology, hydropathy, PTM propensity, disulfides, domain context, and sequence. Importantly, this evidence is applied consistently across modalities, including small-molecule pocket discovery, to avoid selecting chemically plausible but biologically occluded sites.

AI.tldr: Site4Drug是一个AI代理，旨在预测药物结合靶点位点，并能根据证据推荐合适的结合模式（如抗体/肽样 vs 小分子），解决了蛋白质靶点选择的难题，尤其是在膜蛋白中。
AI.motivation: 传统的药物发现流程通常假设已知结合位点，而实际中，确定蛋白质上合适的靶点位点和结合模式（特别是对于膜蛋白）是一个瓶颈。现有方法缺乏对约束条件的考虑，且难以追踪选择位点的推理过程，导致筛选失败时难以判断是模型问题还是位点选择错误。
AI.method: Site4Drug将靶点选择重新定义为一种基于约束和证据的决策问题。它利用AI代理系统，结合蛋白质序列信息，提出候选区域，并根据拓扑结构、疏水性、PTM倾向、二硫键、结构域环境和序列等证据进行排序，同时输出结构化报告，包含应用约束、支持候选的证据和潜在风险。
AI.result: Site4Drug能够预测潜在的结合区域，并根据证据推荐合适的结合模式，为药物设计提供支持。它能够避免选择在化学上可行但生物学上受阻的位点，并提供可追溯的决策日志。
AI.conclusion: Site4Drug通过将靶点选择视为约束优先、证据整合的决策问题，为药物发现提供了一种新的方法，特别是在膜蛋白靶点选择方面具有重要意义，有望加速药物研发进程。

title: Topological texture analysis of microscopy images of dynamic casein gelation and its relation to rheological properties
summary: We propose a novel computational toolbox that integrates Topological Data Analysis (TDA), Differential Box Counting (DBC), Multifractal Partition (MFP), and Local Binary Patterns (LBP), applied to time-lapse super-resolution STED microscopy images of sodium caseinate gelation induced by glucono-delta-lactone (GDL) at 30 °C and 40 °C and two GDL concentrations (1.8% and 3.5% w/v).   TDA tracked topological loops, closed ring-like structures reflecting protein network interconnectivity, via max-Betti-1 curves, which revealed a lag phase of dispersed aggregates, a sharp decay coinciding with network percolation and the rheologically observed sol-gel transition, and a post-gelation increase corresponding to network rearrangements. These topological transitions were corroborated by DBC and MFP as these methods were able to resolve changes in structural complexity and spatial heterogeneity. The toolbox was validated on simulated fractal images prior to experimental application. Together, these descriptors provided sensitivity to subtle microstructural transitions that bulk rheology captured as averaged bulk mechanical responses. This integrated approach provides a robust quantitative tool for characterizing complex microstructure in food and material science with evolving microstructural dynamics. Code is available at https://github.com/Zahratabatabaei/Delifood_CV_paper.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的计算工具箱，结合拓扑数据分析（TDA）、微分盒计数（DBC）、多重分形（MFP）和局部二值模式（LBP），用于分析动态酪凝乳凝胶的显微图像，并将其与流变学性质联系起来。
AI.motivation: 传统的流变学方法只能提供对凝胶宏观力学响应的平均测量，无法有效捕捉到细微的结构变化和空间排列。因此，需要开发更精细的定量图像分析技术，将微观结构观察与宏观行为联系起来。
AI.method: 研究人员将拓扑数据分析（TDA）、微分盒计数（DBC）、多重分形（MFP）和局部二值模式（LBP）应用于在不同温度和 GDL 浓度下诱导的酪蛋白凝胶的超分辨率 STED 显微图像。TDA 跟踪拓扑环路，DBC 和 MFP 解决了结构复杂性和空间异质性的变化。
AI.result: TDA 分析揭示了分散聚集的延迟阶段、与网络渗透和流变学观察到的溶胶-凝胶转变相一致的锐利衰减，以及与网络重排对应的凝胶后增加。这些拓扑转变由 DBC 和 MFP 证实。
AI.conclusion: 该集成方法提供了一种稳健的定量工具，用于表征食品和材料科学中具有不断变化的微观结构的复杂微观结构，能够捕捉到传统流变学无法察觉的细微结构转变，为理解结构-功能关系提供了新的视角。

title: Scalable Inference-Time Annealing with Surrogate Likelihood Estimators
summary: A long standing challenge in computational chemistry and biophysics is efficiently sampling the Boltzmann distribution of molecules. Advances in generative modeling have been proposed to address the limitations of conventional sampling techniques by eliminating the computational cost of simulation. A promising direction is iteratively finetuning diffusion models along a temperature ladder whereby training data is generated via importance sampling during inference-time annealing. Unfortunately, these methods require computing a divergence over the score field to estimate importance weights, rendering them intractable for larger systems. Here we present scalable inference-time annealing (SITA), which retrains flow-based models to generate samples at progressively lower temperatures using an energy-based model to facilitate fast surrogate likelihoods. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both Alanine Dipeptide and Alanine Tripeptide while avoiding costly divergence terms. Our code is available at https://github.com/countrsignal/sita.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SITA（Scalable Inference-Time Annealing）的新方法，利用基于能量的模型快速计算替代似然，从而实现可扩展的推断时间退火，用于高效地采样Boltzmann分布。
AI.motivation: 传统分子构象采样方法（如MCMC和MD）效率低，且对系统微小改动需要重新模拟。现有基于生成模型的采样方法受限于训练数据的获取，难以实现高效的Boltzmann分布采样。
AI.method: SITA方法通过重新训练基于流的模型，利用能量模型构建替代似然，在逐步降低温度的过程中生成样本。该方法避免了计算昂贵的 divergence 项，从而实现了可扩展性。
AI.result: SITA方法在Alanine Dipeptide和Alanine Tripeptide数据集上取得了state-of-the-art的性能，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SITA方法为高效采样Boltzmann分布提供了一种新的途径，有望加速计算化学和生物物理学领域的研究，并为高通量分析提供支持。

title: Conditioned free-energy density of proteins using unbalanced solutions to constraint satisfaction problems
summary: We show that computing the log-partition function (free-energy) of conditioned inhomogeneous Curie--Weiss spin Hamiltonians reduces to an unbalanced $2 \to 1$ norm computation, and design a polynomial-time SDP algorithm for this problem with a lower bound proof for the amount of unbalance achieved. Applied to the protein Ubiquitin, the framework starts from a known crystal structure, explores alternative backbone conformations across the free-energy landscape, and identifies flexible regions of the protein while preserving its native secondary structure.

AI.tldr: 本文将蛋白质的自由能计算转化为不平衡的2→1范数计算问题，并设计了一种多项式时间内的半定规划算法，用于探索蛋白质的自由能景观，识别灵活区域。
AI.motivation: 现有计算工具主要集中于预测蛋白质的基态结构，而缺乏对蛋白质其他构象状态（如过渡态、激发态和部分展开中间态）的有效计算方法，这对于理解蛋白质功能、协同调控和药物设计至关重要。
AI.method: 研究人员将非均匀Curie–Weiss自旋Hamiltonian的对数配分函数（自由能）问题转化为不平衡的2→1范数计算问题，并设计了一种基于半定规划（SDP）的算法，用于计算近似不平衡解。该算法通过扫描条件参数ε，系统地探索蛋白质的条件构象景观。
AI.result: 研究人员在76个残基的泛蛋白（Ubiquitin）上验证了该框架，从晶体结构中推导出的J耦合常数构建自旋Hamiltonian，识别了蛋白质的结构不稳定区域，同时保留了天然二级结构。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一种计算蛋白质自由能的新方法，将问题转化为可高效求解的凸优化问题，为探索蛋白质构象空间和理解蛋白质功能提供了新的理论框架和计算工具。

title: mRNAutilus: Multi-Objective-Guided Discrete Generation of mRNA with Optimized Therapeutic Properties
summary: Therapeutic mRNA design requires coordinating multiple interacting sequence features across the full transcript, where codon usage, untranslated regions (UTRs), and their coupling jointly determine stability, translation efficiency, and protein expression. Here, we present mRNA generation via unrolled trajectories and informed latent updates (mRNAutilus), a framework for simultaneous codon optimization and de novo UTR design directly from sequence. mRNAutilus combines a masked discrete diffusion model trained on millions of full-length mRNAs with Monte Carlo Tree Guidance to generate Pareto-efficient sequences under multiple functional objectives, using lightweight regressors over model embeddings to predict half-life, translation efficiency, and protein abundance. Unlike recent methods that design coding sequences and UTRs separately or rely on post hoc assembly and screening, mRNAutilus generates complete transcripts in a single process optimized across properties. Across diverse targets, zero-shot mRNAs encoding P. pyralis luciferase achieve over 400-fold higher expression than wild-type and outperform commercial and machine learning-designed baselines, including zero-shot generative approaches. Zero-shot SARS-CoV-2 Spike mRNAs exceed clinically used and commercial constructs and match or surpass lab-optimized designs with improved durability. We further demonstrate generality in therapeutic settings, including prime editing (PEMax) and programmable proteome modulation, where mRNAutilus-designed constructs enhance expression of peptide-guided E3 ligases (uAbs) for beta-catenin degradation. These results establish a sequence-based, multi-objective framework for generating functional mRNAs tailored to diverse biological applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了mRNAutilus，一个多目标引导的离散mRNA生成框架，能够同时优化密码子和UTR设计，从而提高治疗性mRNA的稳定性和表达效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的mRNA设计策略通常无法同时优化多个相互关联的序列特征（如密码子、UTR及其相互作用），导致mRNA的稳定性、翻译效率和蛋白质表达受到限制。
AI.method: mRNAutilus结合了在数百万条全长mRNA上训练的掩码离散扩散模型和蒙特卡洛树搜索引导（Monte Carlo Tree Guidance），以生成帕累托最优序列。同时使用轻量级回归器预测半衰期、翻译效率和蛋白质丰度，实现多目标优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，mRNAutilus生成的零样本mRNA在萤火虫酶表达、SARS-CoV-2 Spike蛋白表达以及prime editing等应用中均优于野生型、商业产品和现有机器学习设计方法，展现出显著的表达量和稳定性提升。
AI.conclusion: mRNAutilus提供了一个基于序列的多目标框架，能够生成针对各种生物学应用的定制化功能性mRNA，为mRNA疗法设计提供了新的思路和工具。

title: Demystifying Multimodal Biomolecular Co-design With Intrinsic Geodesic Coupling
summary: Biomolecules such as proteins and small-molecule ligands play a central role in biological systems, arising from the tight interplay between sequence and three-dimensional structure. Recent generative models for biomolecular co-design aim to capture this interplay by jointly modeling coupled modalities. However, existing approaches largely adopt a parallel execution of marginal generative processes, implicitly enforcing fixed synchronous coupling. We argue that a critical but overlooked degree of freedom lies in how these marginal processes are temporally coupled during training and generation, where inappropriate coupling can introduce high-variance supervision and inconsistent intermediate states, affecting modality consistency. To address this, we introduce GeoCoupling, a systematic framework that optimizes for temporal couplings between heterogeneous modalities. Empirical results across structure-based drug design and unconditional protein design demonstrate the learned couplings consistently outperform synchronous and randomly coupled baselines, yielding biomolecules with improved physical validity and diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Geo-Coupling的新框架，用于优化多模态生物分子协同设计中的时间耦合，解决了现有方法中固定同步耦合带来的高方差监督和不一致中间状态问题。
AI.motivation: 现有生物分子协同设计方法通常采用并行执行边缘生成过程，强制固定同步耦合，忽略了不同模态在训练和生成过程中时间耦合的自由度，导致了不一致的中间状态和模态一致性问题。
AI.method: Geo-Coupling框架通过优化异构模态之间的时序耦合，系统性地解决了这个问题。该框架学习了生物分子结构和序列之间的内在几何耦合关系，允许不同模态以不同的速度和方式演化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于Geo-Coupling的协同设计方法在基于结构的药物设计和无条件蛋白质设计任务中，显著优于同步耦合和随机耦合的基线方法，产生了物理有效性和多样性更高的生物分子。
AI.conclusion: Geo-Coupling框架为多模态生物分子协同设计提供了一种新的思路，通过学习内在的几何耦合关系，可以有效地提高设计质量和效率，为蛋白质工程和药物设计带来潜在的应用价值。

title: Probe Before You Edit: Probing-Guided Molecular Optimization for LLM Agents in Structure-Based Drug Design
summary: Structure-based drug design increasingly employs LLM agents to iteratively refine ligands against a target pocket, yet a viable ligand must satisfy two often-conflicting objectives -- binding affinity and druggability -- which single optimization steps rarely improve together. To quantify this difficulty, we introduce two diagnostic metrics: the first measures how often a single edit improves both objectives, and the second measures how often a gain on one objective comes with a loss on the other. Applying these diagnostics to current LLM-agent pipelines exposes a consistent failure mode: the agent performs molecular editing without knowing how the pocket-ligand complex responds to local modifications, thus rarely achieving joint improvement. Inspired by medicinal chemists, who probe the pocket-ligand complex with controlled analog edits before choosing an optimization direction, we propose \textbf{PROBE}, an optimization framework built around edit-response probing. PROBE first decomposes the ligand into editable sites and builds a pocket-specific \textbf{site map} that flags where joint gains are plausible, where the two objectives are likely in tension, and where liability substructures should be changed; it then performs controlled probe edits whose responses are distilled into an \textbf{EditManual}. Guided by the site map and EditManual, PROBE runs an iterative multi-agent loop in which an affinity agent, a druggability agent, and a co-optimization agent jointly produce edits. On the CrossDocked2020 benchmark, PROBE achieves state-of-the-art performance and substantially mitigates the failure modes exposed by our diagnostics metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PROBE的优化框架，通过在编辑分子之前进行探针分析，引导LLM代理在结构化药物设计中同时优化分子结合亲和力和药物适用性，从而避免了常见的优化瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM代理在结构化药物设计中，通常在缺乏对口袋-配体复合物响应的了解的情况下进行分子编辑，导致难以同时提高结合亲和力和药物适用性，且优化效果容易相互抵消。
AI.method: PROBE框架首先将配体分解为可编辑位点，构建口袋特异性位点图，识别潜在的联合改进区域、目标冲突区域和需要修改的潜在有害结构。然后，通过受控探针编辑并提炼响应信息生成编辑手册。最后，利用位点图和编辑手册，PROBE运行一个多代理循环，包括亲和力代理、药物适用性代理和协同优化代理，共同生成编辑。
AI.result: 在CrossDocked2020基准测试中，PROBE框架实现了最先进的性能，并显著缓解了诊断指标揭示的优化失败模式。
AI.conclusion: PROBE框架通过探针引导的分子优化，为LLM代理在结构化药物设计中的应用提供了一种更有效的方法，有望加速药物发现过程。
